svg.text: Color-coded harness-level wiring sheet for the current dry-fit and dry-wire prototype baseline
Units: mm | Scale: not to scale | Wiring baseline from agent/powered_prototype_wiring_diagram.md
Reference diagram only; use the future controller schematic for circuit implementation and pin-level release work.

g.text: 1. This is the primary color-coded wiring sheet for the current dry prototype.
2. Pair this sheet with powered_prototype_component_layout.svg for physical placement.
3. C1 is powered from 5 V but remains a 3.3 V logic system.
4. B1 stays in the control path as a conservative buffer before D1.
5. The current exact powered prototype uses only 24 V and 5 V rails.
6. The stock 12 V cooler fan is not part of the current exact build.
7. Current documentation assumes the 16.0 mm main hose-plug option on both ports.
8. This remains a harness-planning reference, not a circuit schematic release.
